raw: {"questions":[{"label":"Current work clarity","name":"How clear do you feel about your current goals and priorities?","description":"Assesses clarity around current work responsibilities and objectives.","purpose":"competency","stage":"landing","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3}]},{"label":"Late arrival observation","name":"I've noticed you've been arriving late — what's the situation there?","description":"Explores the reason behind the recent pattern of arriving late.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"observation","axis_effects":[{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":1}]},{"label":"Board engagement status","name":"How are you feeling about your current engagement with the board?","description":"Gauges Darren's alignment and relationship with the board.","purpose":"competency","stage":"observation","axis_effects":[{"axis":"engagement","delta":3}]},{"label":"Judgment on recent decisions","name":"What recent strategic decision are you still reflecting on?","description":"Probes Darren's judgment and thought process on past strategic decisions.","purpose":"competency","stage":"underneath","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":1},{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]},{"label":"Unclear expectations","name":"Where are expectations currently unclear for you?","description":"Identifies any areas with unclear expectations affecting performance.","purpose":"competency","stage":"underneath","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3}]},{"label":"Personal growth focus","name":"What area are you looking to grow in over the next quarter?","description":"Explores Darren's personal growth interests and focus for the future.","purpose":"competency","stage":"underneath","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":3}]},{"label":"Support needs","name":"What type of support would be most helpful for you now?","description":"Explores what support Darren currently needs from the manager or team.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"support","axis_effects":[{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":3}]},{"label":"Actionable takeaway","name":"What's one thing from today's conversation you'll act on?","description":"Encourages Darren to identify a concrete next step following the meeting.","purpose":"competency","stage":"support","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]}]}
